issues.detail: The skill does not cover network failures, timeouts, or other edge cases beyond typical login scenarios.

scenarios.name: create-registration-feature-file
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy the rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: write-login-step-definitions-with-world
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes the world definition, setWorldConstructor, a Before hook, and an authenticated GET step, missing only the app property and World import; Response B lacks the world definition and constructor, so it covers fewer rubric items.
